# seerr_notification_pushover (Data Source)

Read Seerr pushover notification settings via /api/v1/settings/notifications/pushover.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `embed_poster` (Boolean)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `notification_types` (Set of String)
- `pushover` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pushover))

<a id="nestedatt--pushover"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pushover`

Read-Only:

- `access_token` (String, Sensitive)
- `sound` (String)
- `user_token` (String, Sensitive)
